200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: The Dark Adventure
Event Date: 25/04/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E38
Engraving 'Morale'

Enhancement: 1
When attacking, the unit recovers 2% / 3% / 4% / 5% / 6% / 7% / 10% health and has a 60% chance to tear through the target's armor. When the enemy's armor is torn, that enemy takes 18800 / 26900 / 38400 / 51200 / 64000 / 80000 / 100000 pure damage, and their physical armor is reduced by 11% / 12% / 13% / 14% / 15% / 17% / 20% for 4 sec. The enemy also takes 40000 / 57100 / 81600 / 108800 / 136000 / 170000 / 200000 physical damage for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
50000 Health from the gems
When attacking, the engraving owner recovers 8% / 9% / 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% health and has a 60% chance to sunder the armor of 2 nearby enemies. When their armor is sundered, enemies takes pure damage equal to 8% / 9% / 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% of their max health and have their physical and magic armor reduced by 18% / 19% / 20% / 22% / 24% / 27% / 30% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. These enemies also take pure damage equal to 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% of their max health for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
100000 Health from the gems
When attacking, the engraving owner increases their health, fortitude, physical and magic armor by 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. They also recover 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% health and have a 60% chance to sunder the armor of 3 nearby enemies. When their armor is sundered, enemies take pure damage equal to 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% of their max health and have their physical and magic armor reduced by 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. These enemies also take pure damage equal to 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% of their max health for 3 sec.
